scripts.dev: yarn workspace seaq build && (yarn workspace seaq dev & yarn workspace @seaq/examples dev & wait)
scripts.release:verify: yarn ts-check && yarn check && yarn test && yarn build
scripts.release:pack: cd packages/core && cp ../../README.md README.md && npm pack --dry-run; rm -f README.md
scripts.release:publish:next: yarn release:verify && cd packages/core && npm publish --access public --tag next
scripts.release:publish:latest: yarn release:verify && cd packages/core && npm publish --access public --tag latest
